title: Trotting wagons x Recruits Compat
description: Makes horsemen from villager recruits able to drive wagons from trotting wagons.
body:
**You can support me through- https://ko-fi.com/knightmare61825**

## How to use:
## 
- Whitelist the wagons in the recruits mountlist in serverconfig. 
- Hire a horseman give him a horsewhip in his main hand.
- Make him mount the wagon with horse attached to it.
- Give him move or follow me command.

**IMPORTANT: DO NOT USE FORMATIONS ON THE HORSEMEN IN WAGONS IF YOU HAVE MULTIPLE AND MAKE A SEPERATE GROUP FOR WAGON DRIVERS**

**You can support me through- https://ko-fi.com/knightmare61825**
